dsl_rule.translation_notes: Multi-timeframe trend-following strategy: sma_200 (weekly/daily longer-term trend proxy) combined with sma_20 (short-term entry timing). Entry occurs when both timeframes align directionally. Exit reverses when short-term trend breaks. Direction is context-dependent as signal applies to both long and short setups based on trend direction.

backtest_rule.reason: Multi-timeframe trend-following strategy: sma_200 (weekly/daily longer-term trend proxy) combined with sma_20 (short-term entry timing). Entry occurs when both timeframes align directionally. Exit reverses when short-term trend breaks. Direction is context-dependent as signal applies to both long and short setups based on trend direction.

source_rule_text: Use multiple time periods to identify longer-term trends while timing short-term entries on faster-response data, filtering short-term trades that align with the longer-term trend direction.
